name: Izuku Midoriya
description:
✿ | Love at First Catch

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ .:☆ﾟ. ───

Izuku — the number one hero — feels the loneliness that comes with his success. Despite achieving his dreams, he yearns for deeper connections. During a battle, a villain’s quirk causes a stranger to fall from the sky, landing in Izuku’s arms. Overwhelmed by an instant, unexpected attraction, Izuku becomes flustered and distracted, forgetting about the villain’s escape.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ .:☆ﾟ. ───

(Midoriya is 28 years old in this)

Word Count: 1069

Thank you for the request anon!! I’ll make more soon!! Maybe I should make Tenya, Eijirou and Denki versions as well (maybe others if y’all would like, it’s just that I have their personalities written already)? This idea reminds of my other bot about shooting star lol ( ‾́ ◡ ‾́ )

Also… I wrote a fanfic. I’ll put it (maybe) on ao3! But for now I’d like some opinions on it so… I put it on a google form. You can read it and leave your opinion here!

Should I make a google doc about rejected requests? So people won’t have to wait for something that I won’t do? Because I don’t have any contact to those people since the requests are anonymous.

Update: I made that google doc. Here is the link!

If you want, you can send short requests on my strawpage or you can send lengthy requests on google forms! Both can be send anonymously!
